---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or behaviour change
title: ""
labels: ["type:feature"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

<!-- What user-facing problem does this solve? Who hits this and how
often? Avoid jumping to a solution here — describe the pain. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- One-paragraph sketch of the approach. If you have multiple ideas,
list them and note the trade-offs. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you ruled out, and why. Including "do nothing" is
valid and often correct. -->

## Scope

- [ ] User-visible change (needs docs + screenshots in the PR)
- [ ] API surface change (needs migration notes)
- [ ] Internal-only refactor

## Out of scope

<!-- What this issue is *not* asking for. Helps reviewers push back on
scope creep. -->
